items.title: NYSUT: 'A robot built by a company associated with sex dolls has no business in our classrooms'

items.title: Study reveals worst cities for McDonald’s broken ice cream machines
items.dek: Anyone who has ordered ice cream from McDonald’s knows it can be hit or miss. Despite offering class cones, milkshakes and the famous McFlurry, the machines are
items.body: Anyone who has ordered ice cream from McDonald’s knows it can be hit or miss. Despite offering class cones, milkshakes and the famous McFlurry, the machines are notoriously “down” or “not working” from time to time. In honor of National Ice Cream Day on July 19, Action Network set out to find out which places have this issue the most, and the results were interesting. submitted by /u/miauguau44 [link] [comments]
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Ukraine's ousted defence minister insists on being reinstated
items.dek: Mykhailo Fedorov refuses President Zelensky's offer to accept an alternative post, as the battle of wills continues.
items.body: Mykhailo Fedorov refuses President Zelensky's offer to accept an alternative post, as the battle of wills continues.
